description: General dad jokes (set 2). 100 unique setups and punchlines.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket apply for a promotion?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It knew it was qualified.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket join a band?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It already had perfect timing.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket open a restaurant?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It wanted to serve fresh ideas.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket go back to school?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. Learning never goes out of style.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket visit the doctor?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It needed a check-up on life.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket start a podcast?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It finally had something to say.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket run a marathon?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It wanted to go the extra mile.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket become a detective?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It always noticed the little details.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket host a party?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. Everyone said it was a natural entertainer.

jokes.setup: Why did the blanket write a book?
jokes.punchline: It liked covering for its friends. It had quite a story to tell.
